cases.prompt: codex review 해줘. PR 올리기 전에 한번 봐줘.

assertions.text: The agent extracts the diff (git diff main...HEAD) and project stack info from CLAUDE.md.
The agent invokes Gstack /codex skill with 'review' mode and the prepared context.
The agent interprets the Codex response and presents findings with severity tags (blocker/major/minor/nit).
The agent provides a clear PASS or FAIL verdict.
If Codex CLI is not installed, the agent provides installation instructions.

cases.prompt: 이 코드 codex 한테 도전시켜봐. 깨뜨릴 수 있는지 보자.

assertions.text: The agent sends the full file contents (not just diff) to Codex with adversarial prompt.
The agent reports any bugs, edge cases, or security issues found.
Each finding includes a severity assessment.
If Claude disagrees with a Codex finding, it presents both perspectives to the user.
